decision.next_required_evidence: Stage 2b repeats, downstream propagation, and Stage 2e paired confirmation

design_input_independence.interpretation: design-input independence only; knob-output associations are reported separately

deposition_thickness:deposition_sticking.basis: passivation amount and spatial distribution jointly control protected wall area

etch_time:deposition_thickness.basis: historical depth-matched evidence reported a passivation-dose effect that changed with etch duration

etch_time:ion_rate.basis: both jointly set ion-driven displacement per cycle; exact 2x2 anchors prevent a product alias from being mistaken for separate main effects

etch_time:neutral_rate.basis: etch duration and neutral coefficient jointly set neutral-driven displacement per cycle

etch_time:neutral_sticking_probability.basis: etch duration can change the effect of neutral reaction-versus-reflection probability

ion_source_exponent:theta_r_min.basis: incident angular distribution and surface reflection rule jointly determine transported ion angles

neutral_rate:neutral_sticking_probabilit.basis: neutral reaction strength and spatial reaction probability are physically coupled model controls

excluded_wired_controls.evidence_status: boundary-limited: 0 through -0.04 tested and survived; the frozen -0.05/-0.06/-0.08 failure bracket did not run
excluded_wired_controls.exclusion_rationale: mask erosion/selectivity is a distinct hard-gate challenge and must not be mixed into the nominal-morphology response surface
excluded_wired_controls.name: mask_ion_rate
excluded_wired_controls.required_followup: run a separately frozen bounded mask-erosion/selectivity challenge before any mask-process-margin claim

excluded_wired_controls.exclusion_rationale: varying cycle count independently here would break the required depth-matched morphology comparison
excluded_wired_controls.held_value: selected by per-recipe depth matching up to 30 cycles
excluded_wired_controls.name: num_cycles

mask_response_interpretation: Mask remaining height is retained as a hard-gate/numerical diagnostic only. With mask_ion_rate fixed at zero, Stage 2a cannot create a mask-erosion sensitivity hypothesis.

paired_noise.reason: one independent stream was allocated per recipe to maximize broad surface coverage

target_depth_crossing.censoring_rule: crossings before the first saved checkpoint are left-censored; trajectories below target at the final checkpoint are right-censored; neither is imputed into correlations or response models
target_depth_crossing.definition: first linearly interpolated cycle at depth 1.25 when consecutive saved checkpoints bracket it
target_depth_crossing.model_phase_duration_definition: initial_etch_time + crossing_cycle * (1 passivation + 1 passivation-removal + etch_time); simulator process-duration units, not wall-clock or calibrated fab time
